update.description: Update an item in an existing list

create.description: Create an item in an existing list

upsert.description: Create a new item, or update the current one if it already exists (upsert)

delete.description: Delete an item from a list

get.description: Retrieve details of a single list

site.description: Select the site to retrieve lists from

folder.description: Select the folder to upload the file to

fileName.description: The name of the file being uploaded

changeFileContent.description: Whether to update the file contents

fileContents.description: Find the name of input field containing the binary data to upload in the Input panel on the left, in the Binary tab

list.description: Select the list you want to retrieve

noticeUnsupportedFields.displayName: Due to API restrictions, the following column types cannot be updated: Hyperlink, Location, Metadata

item.description: Select the item you want to get

filter.description: The formula will be evaluated for each record. More info.

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

fields.description: The fields you want to include in the output

batchSize.description: Input will be split in batches to throttle requests. -1 for disabled. 0 will be treated as 1.

batchInterval.description: Time (in milliseconds) between each batch of requests. 0 for disabled.

batchSize.description: Input will be split in batches to throttle requests. -1 for disabled. 0 will be treated as 1.

batchInterval.description: Time (in milliseconds) between each batch of requests. 0 for disabled.

allowUnauthorizedCerts.description: Whether to accept the response even if SSL certificate validation is not possible

proxy.description: HTTP proxy to use. If authentication is required it can be defined as follow: http://username:password@myproxy:3128

timeout.description: Time in ms to wait for the server to send response headers (and start the response body) before aborting the request
